metadata.methodology: City-level search across Fargo, Bismarck, and Grand Forks with homepage/contact extraction plus selective snippet confirmation for contact normalization

candidates.notes: Established Fargo engraving and marking business with direct email plus surfaced phone contacts. Useful industrial/awards-style fit for the directory.
Fargo promotional signage and custom-products shop with explicit laser engraving, flatbed printing, CNC routing, and custom awards capability.
Grand Forks laser cutting and engraving workshop with UV, fiber, and CO2 capability and a clear walk-in/workshop address signal.

candidates.address: 301 E Front Ave Suite 100, Bismarck, ND 58504
candidates.notes: Bismarck awards and recognition supplier with plaques, trophies, promotional products, and custom imprint capability. Strong state-capital coverage and good commercial fit.
Local Fargo trophy and personalization shop with surfaced direct phone, email, and address. A little more awards-led than fabrication-led, but still a solid engraving record.
Custom signs, laser engraving, banners, stickers, trophies, and awards. Relevant for western-state coverage, but the surfaced landing page felt more Williston-centered than truly Bismarck-localized.
